description: Creates an Action Plan Template Approver for a given Project Action Plan Template.

first_name.description: First name of the Party Person

last_name.description: Last name of the Party Person

name.description: Full name of the Party Person

user_id.description: Login Information ID associated with the Party Person

is_employee.description: Indicates whether Party is an Employee of the current Company

login.description: Login Information associated with the Party Person

updated_at.description: Time the Party Person was updated

id.description: Vendor ID of the Party Person

name.description: Vendor Name of the Party Person

plan_template_id.description: ID of the Project Action Plan Template

party_id.description: ID of the Party to be designated as the Plan Approver
